nancys-falafel-pistachios.name: Nancy's Falafel Pistachios

ingredients.prep: such as chilies de árbol or pequin chilies

instructions: Combine the first six ingredients in a small bowl. Set aside the "falafel" spice.

Line a plate with paper towels, Using a mandolin with a safety attachment to protect your fingers, cut the garlic cloves into paper-thin slices. Pour olive oil into a medium-size heavy skillet and heat over medium-high heat. Add the garlic slices and cook until crisp and light golden brown; do not burn or the garlic and oil will be unusable. Remove from the heat. Using a slotted utensil, immediately transfer the garlic chips to the prepared plate to drain. Reserve the garlic-cooking oil.

Add the chilies and 2 tablespoons of the reserved garlic-cooking oil (save the remainder for another use) to a large heavy skillet. Set over medium-high heat. Add the pistachios and sauté for 1 to 2 minutes. Add the "falafel" spice and salt and stir until the pistachios are coated with spice and heated through, 3 to 4 minutes. Remove from heat. Transfer the pistachios and chilies to a serving bowl. Add the garlic chips and toss well. Serve warm or at room temperature.

nats-buttery-cashew-crunch.name: Nat's Buttery Cashew Crunch
instructions: Generously butter or grease a large baking sheet.

In a saucepan over medium heat, combine butter, sugar, salt, and corn syrup. Cook and stir until butter is melted. Stir in cashews and increase the heat to high. Cook until mixture reaches 300 to 154°C (149 to 154 degrees C) on a candy thermometer, or until a small amount of syrup dropped into cold water forms hard, brittle threads. Stir occasionally with a long-handled wooden spoon so the cashews do not burn.
Pour onto the prepared baking sheet. Let cool for about 10 minutes, then break into pieces.

newfoundland-style-pea-soup.name: Newfoundland-style Pea Soup
instructions: Place beef into a large container and cover with water. Soak in the refrigerator to remove excess salt, 8 hours to overnight. Drain, rinse, and cut beef into small cubes.

Bring cubed beef, 10 cups water, and peas to a boil in a large pot over high heat. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until peas have softened and mostly dissolved, about 30 minutes. Stir or whisk frequently to help peas dissolve and to keep soup from burning on the bottom of the pot.
Stir in carrots, turnips, and black pepper. Continue simmering until vegetables have softened, about 15 minutes more.

no-bake-layered-pumpkin-spice-cheesecake.name: No-bake Layered Pumpkin Spice Cheesecake
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Blend pumpkin, cream cheese, sugar, and pie spice together in a bowl.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Pour some of mixture into the pie crust until it is 2/3 full.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Stir whipped topping into the remaining pumpkin mixture.'}
{'step': '4', 'description': 'Pour into the pie crust, over the first layer.'}
{'step': '5', 'description': 'Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes, or until ready to serve.'}

northwest-marionberry-pie.name: Northwest Marionberry Pie

ingredients.item: Pastry for a 9-inch double crust pie

instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Combine marionberries, 3/4 cup sugar, flour, and lemon juice together in a large bowl.

Place 1 pie crust in bottom of a 9-inch pie plate; add marionberry filling. Cover with remaining crust; crimp edges to seal. Brush pie lightly with water. Sprinkle remaining 2 teaspoons sugar on top. Cut 4 to 8 slits (1-inch) in top crust with a knife.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Reduce heat to 177°C (175 degrees C); continue baking until crust golden, 45 to 50 minutes more. Let cool completely before serving, about 1 hour.

nutella-cupcakes-argiro.name: Nutella Cupcakes

ingredients.item: Four big eggs in a hot room.
Four big eggs in a hot room.

instructions: In a bowl, mix the cocoa and lukewarm milk first.
In another bowl, mix the flour, soda, baking powder and salt.
In a pot, over medium heat, add the butter and sugar and mix to melt. Lower the butter from the fire. Empty it in a bowl and allow it to turn lukewarm.
With a hand mixer, beat for 4 minutes.
Add the eggs one at a time and beat at medium speed until homogenized.
Add the vanilla and cocoa mixture and beat at low speed for 1 minute. Add the flour mixture alternately with the yogurt and gently mix to make a fluffy dough.
Prepare the cups in the cupcake forms and add the mixture, filling them by 2/3.
Bake in the resists on the last grill for 24 minutes.
We take them off and let them cool down.

nutella-tart-teleculinaria.name: Nutella Tart
instructions: Beat the cream in whipped cream. Add the chocolate and hazelnut cream, slowly and always beating. Reserve.
Line the interior in a shape (about 18 cm in diameter) with adhesive film.

Quickly pass some cookies through the coffee and form a layer at the bottom of the form. Cover it with a piece of chocolate cream. Repeat the layers until the ingredients are finished, finishing with the cream.
Take it to the freezer for about two hours. Remove, peel carefully on a plate and decorate with chocolate melted in yarn and coarsely chopped hazelnuts. Serve right away.
